title: hedysarum obscurum subsp. boutignyanum
intro: Hedysarum obscurum subsp. boutignyanum, also known as the Boutigny's Hedysarum, is a plant species within the legume family, characterized by its unique morphology and medicinal properties. This plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which contribute to its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Hedysarum obscurum subsp. boutignyanum include its ability to regulate digestive functions, soothe stomach ulcers, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
